task_completion.description: Open the patient record for Jean DUPONT.

task_completion.description: Select the correct medical report PDF for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog or import window shows the file 'cr_cardio.pdf' from the path '/home/ga/Desktop/' selected or loaded.

task_completion.description: Set the document label exactly as requested.

task_completion.description: Set the document date to today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field associated with the document import is set to the current date (today's date at the time the screenshot was taken).

task_completion.description: Complete the import process so the document appears in the patient's record.

integrity.description: The agent used the medical software GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the medical application's graphical interface (e.g., clicking buttons, filling fields) rather than executing scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent imported the actual PDF file rather than manually typing its contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: An import file dialog or attachment interface is visible, confirming the file '/home/ga/Desktop/cr_cardio.pdf' was uploaded, rather than a blank text document being manually filled.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database insertion commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing SQL commands (e.g., INSERT INTO) to bypass the application's UI.
